story.description: A clip of space, planets, solar activity, rockets, satellites, or astronomy: an astronaut walking on a rocky terrain
story.hook: The moon shows us one face for a reason.
story.lead: The moon shows us one face for a reason. Watch the moon's position, because its rotation and orbit are locked together. It spins once in about the same time it circles Earth, so the same side keeps facing us. That is synchronized motion, not stillness. Which orbit clue next?
story.script: The moon shows us one face for a reason. Watch the moon's position, because its rotation and orbit are locked together. It spins once in about the same time it circles Earth, so the same side keeps facing us. That is synchronized motion, not stillness. Which orbit clue next?

story.description: A clip of farm animals: mare and foal play in dusty outdoor enclosure
story.lead: Horses can remember familiar faces. Watch the eyes and ears, because horses can learn who is familiar and who feels safe. That memory changes how calmly they approach people and other horses. The look is part recognition, part decision. Which herd animal next?
story.script: Horses can remember familiar faces. Watch the eyes and ears, because horses can learn who is familiar and who feels safe. That memory changes how calmly they approach people and other horses. The look is part recognition, part decision. Which herd animal next?

story.description: A clip of farm animals: grazing horses on a scenic hilltop
story.hook: Horses show attention with their ears.
story.lead: Horses show attention with their ears. Watch the ears before the body moves, because each ear can turn toward a sound or animal the horse is tracking. That small shift shows where attention is going before the next step. The ears are a radar dish, not decoration. Would you spot it?
story.script: Horses show attention with their ears. Watch the ears before the body moves, because each ear can turn toward a sound or animal the horse is tracking. That small shift shows where attention is going before the next step. The ears are a radar dish, not decoration. Would you spot it?
